content.en:
Union of Lords Headquarters.

Qin Yu was a little impatient, and he finally asked: "Give you another chance, are you willing to surrender to me, if you don't answer again, then never answer!"

After speaking, Qin Yu's aura burst out.

Rumble!!!

The entire space-time territory and the headquarters of the Lords Alliance were almost forbidden under a terrifying force, and those eternal realms had no ability to move at all, as if everything was imprisoned, even time and space were imprisoned.

This is the strength of the Legendary Lord of the Near-Perfection Realm, far beyond the ordinary Initial Realm Lord, and even more so than the ordinary Legendary Realm.

"This ...... What a terrifying aura, can the Endless Lord defeat such an existence?"

Lord Binghan was a little suspicious, and his heart began to waver.

Not only was she suspicious, but even the other Legendary Lords were a little shaken, after all, they didn't want to fall!

At this time, Ye Tian finally arrived

If he didn't show up, in case these five legendary lords all took refuge in Qin Yu, then he would be fighting alone.

"Young Master Qin Yu, this person is the Endless Lord Ye Tian!"

When the Dark Mist Lord saw Ye Tian appear, he immediately said.

Rumble!!!!!

Qin Yu slapped his palm on the body of the Dark Mist Lord, directly hitting the Dark Mist Lord's body and cracking, countless particles were annihilated, and he was directly hit hard.

This was his body, not his doppelganger, and he was almost killed in an instant.

At this time, the Lord of the Dark Mist was very annoyed in his heart, but on the surface, he showed an innocent face.

"Young Master Qin Yu, what did I do wrong? @暗雾领主询问道.

"Hmph!" Qin Yu snorted coldly and said, "Lord of the Dark Mist, do you dare to play with Ben Shao?" You said before that the Endless Lord is just an Immortal Realm Lord, but is he now an Immortal Realm Lord? He is clearly a Legendary Realm Lord, and he is not a Legendary Realm Lord, but has reached the Initial Realm, and has reached the seventh step of the Initial Realm, which is the highest Legendary Realm cultivated in your space-time territory. Ben Shao hates others to deceive me the most, if you have a little merit and brought me here, otherwise you will die just now'!"

"What, the Legendary Lord of the Seven-Step Initial Realm?"

The Lord of the Mist was dumbfounded.

He carefully observed Ye Tian, Ye Tian was really a legendary lord, and he had stepped into the initial realm that he had dreamed of, and it was far beyond the ordinary initial realm, and he had reached the initial realm of the first few steps, and his realm was too low to see through.

But Qin Yu didn't need to lie to him, Qin Yu said that Ye Tian had reached the seven-step Initial Realm Legendary Lord, and that must have reached this realm.

For a moment, he didn't know how to explain it.

He has not been long away from fighting Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian's talent is good, in a place like the space-time territory, it would be quite good to be able to break through to the Legendary Flame Lord by luck, how could he suddenly cross over to the seventh step of the Ding Yu Origin Realm.

This is not normal!

If he were Qin Yu, he wouldn't believe such words.

"Young Master Qin Yu, I really didn't deceive you!" said the Dark Mist Lord anxiously.

I saw Qin Yu wave his hand and let the Dark Mist Lord stop.

Now what the truth is, he doesn't bother to care.

He just wants to deal with Ye Tian's matter now, and talk about it later.

"You're very good, you can actually cultivate to the seven-step initial realm in a place like Yuanhai, are you willing to be my guard?" Qin Yu invited.

As for whether this invitation was sincere or not, only he himself knows.

But even if it was a sincere invitation, it was impossible for Ye Tian to agree.

So, he directly refused: "Lord Zhenyu, I don't have the habit of being a guard for others, this is the territory of Yuanhai time and space, outsiders are not very welcome, if Lord Zhenyu is fine, please leave." "

Wow!

A cold aura burst out from Qin Yu's body, turning into an endless killing intent, running through endless time and space, and rushing towards Ye Tian.

"If you dare to speak to me like that, you will die!!"

Qin Yu made a move, and as soon as he made a move, he didn't have the slightest intention of keeping his hand.

He directly burst out with all his power and unleashed one of his top legendary eternal skills, the Endless Fire Prison

Buzz Buzz!!!!

It seems that the endless fire prison is constantly stacked.In fact, this involves space, forming a kind of cycle, if you don't have enough power, you can't break the endless fire prison at all.You will be trapped in the endless fire prison, and you will be incinerated to death by the fire power of the endless fire prison.

"What a horrible attack!!"

One Legendary Lord, one after another, did not dare to touch Qin Yu's attack, and the five Legendary Lords of the space-time territory also dodged one after another.

At this moment, Ye Tian's body erupted with extremely powerful power.

Hiss!!!

The Endless Fire Prison was directly shattered by Ye Tian, and the terrifying flames couldn't hurt Ye Tian at all.

Ye Tian walked out bathed in the flames that escaped from the endless fire prison, his body shook, and all those flames were annihilated.

"'Oh, these flames belong to some kind of eternal path flames, but unfortunately they are still a little less powerful. Ye Tian said with a smile.

Rumble!!!!

The two collided and fought, and after only a few moves, Qin Yu was directly knocked out.

Abrupt.

A Will Slashing Sword composed entirely of the Eternal Force penetrated through, and no matter how Qin Yu resisted, he was still pierced through his body by a sword, and he was immediately injured.

"Legendary Eternal Technique !!!! impossible, you are just an Initial Realm Lord, how can you create a Legendary Eternal Technique? Even if you are a Legendary Lord of many Realm Realms, you may not be able to create a Legendary Eternal Technique!!"

Qin Yu yelled.

At this moment, his mentality really collapsed.

I thought that this was a great opportunity, but I ended up meeting a legendary lord like Ye Tian, a legendary lord who can use legendary-level eternal skills, even in the Infinite Sea, it is also a legendary peerless (Zhao) demon, which is far from being comparable to him.

"No, I haven't lost yet, I still have the eternal treasure!!!"

Qin Yu thought.

Immediately, he urged his eternal treasure, the Fire Domain Sword!

This is a fire sword that can greatly increase his combat effectiveness, and in the immeasurable sea, the fire domain sword is also an eternal treasure that can be ranked, and it does not belong to the lowest grade.

I saw that after Qin Yu held the Fire Domain Sword, his combat power was already comparable to that of a true Consummation Realm Legendary Lord, and the strength that Ye Tian had just shown was only comparable to that of a Consummation Realm Legendary Lord.

"Kill!"

Qin Yu fought hard, not wanting to admit defeat at all.

And he seemed to have forgotten that Ye Tian had several clones, but in fact, Ye Tian only needed a copy body to defeat Qin Yu.

Ye Tian saw that Qin Yu had cast the Eternal Treasure, and he no longer hid it, urging his Mixed Yuan Order. _
